description: Educational-proxy CNY investment-grade corporate credit-spread (ChinaBond AA+ medium-term-note option-adjusted spread over the China Government Bond curve) monthly history, 2006-2025, used to drive the Phase 18 Task 2 CIR++ credit-spread calibration (risk MR-012). EDUCATIONAL PROXY series approximating published ChinaBond / Wind AA+ corporate OAS levels; NOT a credentialled vendor feed. Replace with licensed market-data extracts and re-run sign-off before any regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.
credit_index: ChinaBond AA+ corporate MTN OAS over CGB (proxy)

monthly_synthesis.method: A monthly CIR++ credit-spread path is simulated from the documented target parameters (target_mean_reversion, target_long_run_spread, target_spread_vol, shift) using a seeded full-truncation Euler scheme on the square-root factor x = spread - shift: x_{t+1} = x_t + kappa*(b - x_t)*dt + sigma*sqrt(max(x_t,0))*sqrt(dt)*Z, b = target_long_run_spread - shift, dt = 1/12. The realised spread = clip(x + shift). Fully deterministic given the seed. The CIR OLS calibrator recovers the long-run spread (sample-mean robust), the spread vol (residual-variance robust) and the mean-reversion speed (regression-slope, noisier) from this single path; the market price of credit risk is derived from the documented risk-neutral long-run anchor.

documented_sources_note: Long-run AA+ corporate OAS over CGB in the educational range 90-160 bp; risk-neutral (CDS/bond-implied) long-run spread sits above the physical long-run mean by a credit risk premium, here 200 bp vs 120 bp, so a positive market price of credit risk re-anchors the Q-measure level upward.

primary_sources: ChinaBond AA+ corporate medium-term-note option-adjusted spread over the CGB curve, monthly (educational proxy levels)
China 5Y CDS / bond-implied risk-neutral long-run spread anchor (educational proxy)
data_lineage.production_restriction: Proxy levels only. Replace with licensed ChinaBond/Wind/Markit extracts and re-run sign-off before regulatory, pricing, or capital-adequacy use.

notes: 20 calendar years of monthly synthesis (>= 240 monthly observations; the credit calibration needs >= 60). The CIR++ square-root factor and the deterministic shift keep the spread non-negative; the long-run spread of ~120 bp sits in the middle of the documented AA+ corporate range.
